name: Norddampf Relict 45mm Black Aroma Glass Mouthpiece
summary: Offer your customers a stylish upgrade with the Norddampf Relict 45 mm Black Aroma Glass Mouthpiece — a premium replacement for the RELICT Vaporiser.
description: Offer your customers a stylish upgrade with the Norddampf Relict 45 mm Black Aroma Glass Mouthpiece — a premium replacement for the RELICT Vaporiser. Made from durable black-tinted borosilicate glass, this mouthpiece delivers the same vapour quality as the standard tube with a more discreet and modern aesthetic. A popular add-on for style-conscious consumers, this glass mouthpiece combines proven performance with a sleek visual upgrade: This black aroma mouthpiece functions exactly like the standard RELICT glass tube, delivering pure, cool vapour. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
